description.value:
Many psykers use these small, personalised items to steady themselves before accessing the terrible powers of the Warp. Each is different; some might be no more than a carved finger bone or pressed flower, while others could be a softly glowing crystal or void-iron glyph. All, however, are specially attuned to their bearers through long meditation or ritual, allowing them greater control over their abilities.

When a psyker with a psy focus makes a Focus Power test, he gains a +10 bonus.
description.summary: When a psyker with a psy focus makes a Focus Power test, he gains a +10 bonus.

system.effect: When a psyker with a psy focus makes a Focus Power test, he gains a +10 bonus.
